mapper.select: SELECT sub.service_code, sub.deceased_code, dd.deceased_name FROM subscription sub JOIN deceased_data dd ON sub.deceased_code = dd.deceased_code WHERE sub.user_code = #{userCode};
SELECT sub.subscription_code AS subscription_code, sub.service_code AS service_code FROM subscription sub WHERE sub.user_code = #{userCode} AND sub.deceased_code IS NULL

SELECT subscription_code as subscriptionCode, user_code as userCode, service_code as serviceCode, deceased_code as deceasedCode, start_date as startDate FROM subscription WHERE subscription_code = #{subscriptionCode}

SELECT d.deceased_code, d.deceased_name, d.gender, d.deceased_age, d.personality, d.deceased_nickname, d.user_nickname, d.relationship, d.speaking_tone, s.subscription_code, s.service_code, s.user_code, s.deceased_code FROM deceased_data d LEFT JOIN subscription s ON d.deceased_code = s.deceased_code AND s.user_code = #{userCode} WHERE d.deceased_code = #{deceasedCode}
